title: TIP-1.0 Companion Journal Row
description: One row in the companion-local session journal (~/.tokenpak/companion/journal.db). Companion-side UX state per Constitution §5.2-C; NEVER a source of truth for billing or cache. Rows complement (not replace) the wire-side telemetry rows written by services.telemetry_service. See https://docs.tokenpak.ai/protocol/telemetry-semantics.

session_id.description: Stable identifier for the companion session. Ties rows back to a single Claude Code invocation.

tip_version.description: TIP version under which this entry was emitted.

entry_type.description: Entry category. Open vocabulary per TIP extension model; well-known values include: auto, user, milestone, cost, capsule, companion_savings, pre_send. Components MAY introduce new ext.* entry types via the ext namespace.

source.description: Emitting component (e.g. 'hook.pre_send', 'mcp.journal_write'). Null when legacy rows pre-date source tagging.

tokens_avoided.description: Pre-wire tokens saved by companion optimizations. Companion attribution only — never conflated with wire-side savings.

cost_avoided_usd.description: Pre-wire cost saved in USD. Estimated — wire-side telemetry is the billing source of truth.

ext.description: Namespaced extension fields per docs/protocol/extension-model.md. Core fields MUST NOT be shadowed here.
